name: GER.PERRIER INH.  EO 0,5
summary: G√É¬©rard Perrier Industrie S.A. engages in designing, manufacturing, installing, and maintaining electrical, electronic, and automation equipment in France and internationally. It installs, commissions, and maintains electrical equipment, automated systems, instrumentation, and valve systems in the energy sectors; develops electronic products and instrumentation for handling systems for nuclear and industrial use; and designs and manufactures electrical and electronic cabinets, and sub-assemblies for industry. The company also offers cloud and web development, industrial IOT, and cybersecurity services; designs and manufactures tailor-made electrical and electronic equipment for automated systems and electric power supply of industrial machines and processes; cable transport, lifting, and machine safety in the mountains, as well as in urban and industrial environments. It provides electrical and IT solutions for the control of technical installations in the agri-food industry; and technical assistance to nuclear power plants and in the non-destructive testing and inspection. The company is headquartered in Lyon, France. G√É¬©rard Perrier Industrie S.A. operates as a subsidiary of Amperra SAS.
